queries.query: INSERT INTO ts_filter_preset (page_key, user_id, name, conditions, scope, is_default) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?::jsonb, ?, ?) RETURNING preset_id

query.name: Presets per Page und User laden

queries.query: SELECT preset_id, page_key, user_id, name, conditions, scope, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_filter_preset WHERE page_key = ? AND (scope = 'GLOBAL' OR user_id = ?) ORDER BY scope, name
UPDATE ts_filter_preset SET name = ?, conditions = ?::jsonb, scope = ?, is_default = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE preset_id = ?
UPDATE ts_filter_preset SET is_default = FALSE WHERE page_key = ? AND scope = ? AND is_default = TRUE
UPDATE ts_filter_preset SET is_default = FALSE WHERE page_key = ? AND scope = ? AND is_default = TRUE AND user_id = ?
UPDATE ts_filter_preset SET is_default = TRUE WHERE preset_id = ?
UPDATE ts_filter_preset SET is_default = FALSE WHERE preset_id = ?

SELECT preset_id, page_key, user_id, name, conditions, scope, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_filter_preset WHERE page_key = ? AND is_default = TRUE AND (user_id = ? OR scope = 'GLOBAL') ORDER BY CASE WHEN user_id = ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END LIMIT 1
SELECT preset_id, page_key, user_id, name, conditions, scope, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM ts_filter_preset WHERE preset_id = ?
